visual_description:
A wide shot captures three figures in a small boat on a dark body of water at night. The boat, which appears to be a small inflatable, is illuminated from the front, casting a blue and red glow. The two people sitting in the boat are silhouetted, while a third person stands, also in silhouette. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The background is completely black, with only a few distant, out-of-focus lights visible on the horizon. The camera remains static. The audio opens with a man shouting in a loud, high-pitched, and excited voice, "The amount of cocaine is correct!" His tone is one of triumphant confirmation.

The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man in a dark, outdoor setting at night. He is wearing a dark, collared shirt and has a concerned and intense expression. Behind him, another man is partially visible, and the background is dark with some out-of-focus lights and foliage. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the upper left corner.
